subject: feat(ui): move location search from map overlay to below the map
body:
Search bar now sits between the map and station list (where filters
used to be) instead of floating over the map. Gives the map a cleaner
look and keeps search accessible without obscuring map content.

Tags: ui, layout
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: home-layout
Semver: minor
